sentences.translation: Rekao je da želi kratku frizuru.
sentences.translationEn: He said he wanted a short haircut.

sentences.translation: Berber mu je pažljivo ošišao kosu.
sentences.translationEn: The barber cut his hair carefully.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ فِي المِرْآةِ وَأَعْجَبَهُ الشَّكْلُ.
sentences.translation: Abdullah je pogledao u ogledalo i svidio mu se izgled.
sentences.translationEn: Abdullah looked in the mirror and liked the look.
He paid and thanked the barber.
